<!-- Which system component or layer does this affect? (e.g., registry, MCP, n8n, HubSpot, Drive) -->

<!-- Describe the current architecture or design relevant to this issue. -->

<!-- Describe the architectural change, decision, or addition being proposed. -->

<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Impact Assessment
- [ ] Affects existing integrations
- [ ] Requires data migration
- [ ] Requires workflow updates
- [ ] Breaking change
